_obsolete_reason: Group-MMS routing was retired in Phase 2 of the 1:1 SMS pivot. Rewrite required for Phase 7.
description: Planner announces injury, can't attend but stays in chat to coordinate checkout logistics. Non-planner adds people mid-thread. Extended off-topic bonding. Third-party status reports. Based on real Tahoe ski trip text.

messages.body: Hey
Annika - Tahoe
Allison
Bri
Andy
that's everyone for now
I unfortunately broke my arm this week and am out of any and all snow activities through the end of the season. But I want you all to still come up and enjoy the cabin!!
messages._note: PLANNER DROPS OUT: announces can't attend but wants trip to continue. Should NOT end session

messages.body: I'll keep y'all updated if I do decide to come back, and let me know if this changes any of your plans too
Annika noooooooo!!!!! I'm so so sorry
messages._note: Emotional response — not a trip decision, should be ignored

messages.body: There's also a chance Nick and amanda might be up that weekend too!
messages._note: Planner mentions potential additions — not actionable yet

messages.body: I have to ask.. was it snowboarding or skiing??
UGH snowboarding!! I'm a stereotype lol
NOOOO
Omg in a class??? Too bad you can't sue the instructor haha
I'm going to try and get some money from it!! he told me to try this way of turning, then left me alone, and when I tried his turn that's when I fell and broke my arm!
Well the instructor sounds like a dick!
ooooof I'm so sorry to hear that!!
Def sue that bro
Hi! Quickly following up to check on diff logistics. What day(s) are most people considering going up? Do we need to rent any vehicles?
messages._note: Non-planner taking over logistics — legitimate trip planning question

messages.body: Mar 16-17 works for the cabin
messages._note: DECIDING_DATES: planner proposes dates even though not attending

messages.body: works for me
same
I sadly have to fly to DC next Sunday for work so don't think I'm going to make it so potentially another spot if hasn't been filled
messages._note: SOFT DROPOUT: not a hard no, leaving door open. Should mark as tentative opt-out

messages.body: Michelle is a TBD since she might be too jet lagged post Japan
messages._note: THIRD-PARTY STATUS: planner reporting someone else's status. Should NOT be attributed to planner

messages.body: Amanda - hey everyone! Nick and I will have an SUV. Leaving Thurs night around 730-8 pm.
messages._note: LATE JOINER: new person added by non-planner, introduces self with logistics

messages.body: Michelle
STATUS
messages._note: Status should show planner as non-attending but still planner, all participants listed
